fields.summary: Profile Settings — Name, Avatar, and Email Change
fields.description:
As a user, I want to update my profile information (display name, avatar, and email address) so that my account reflects my current identity.

## Details
- Display name: 2-50 characters, alphanumeric and spaces only
- Avatar: upload JPG/PNG up to 2MB, cropped to 200x200
- Email change: requires current password confirmation and sends verification email to new address
- Changes are saved individually (partial save supported)
fields.acceptance_criteria:
Given a logged-in user on the profile settings page
When they update their display name to a valid value
Then the name is saved and reflected across the app

Given a logged-in user
When they upload a valid avatar image
Then the image is cropped and displayed as their profile picture

Given a logged-in user
When they change their email and confirm with their password
Then a verification email is sent to the new address

Given a logged-in user
When they enter an invalid display name (empty or >50 chars)
Then an inline validation error is shown

fields.summary: Notification Preferences — Email, Push, and SMS Toggles
fields.description:
As a user, I want to manage my notification preferences so that I only receive alerts through my preferred channels.

## Details
- Three channels: email, push notifications, SMS
- Each channel has category-level toggles: marketing, product updates, security alerts, activity
- Security alerts cannot be fully disabled (always sent via at least one channel)
- Changes take effect immediately without page reload
fields.acceptance_criteria:
Given a logged-in user on the notification settings page
When they toggle off email notifications for marketing
Then marketing emails stop and the toggle reflects the new state

Given a logged-in user
When they attempt to disable all channels for security alerts
Then they see a warning that at least one channel must remain active

Given a logged-in user
When they enable push notifications
Then the browser requests push notification permission

Given a logged-in user
When they toggle SMS notifications on
Then they are prompted to verify their phone number if not already verified

fields.summary: Privacy Settings — Visibility, Data Export, and Account Deletion
fields.description:
As a user, I want to control my privacy settings so that I can manage who sees my profile and handle my personal data.

## Details
- Profile visibility: public, contacts only, private
- Data export: GDPR-compliant full data export in JSON format, generated async with email notification
- Account deletion: soft delete with 30-day recovery window, requires password confirmation
- Activity visibility: toggle for showing online status and last active timestamp
fields.acceptance_criteria:
Given a logged-in user on the privacy settings page
When they set profile visibility to "contacts only"
Then only approved contacts can view their profile

Given a logged-in user
When they request a data export
Then a background job generates the export and emails a download link within 24 hours

Given a logged-in user
When they initiate account deletion and confirm with their password
Then the account enters a 30-day soft-delete state with a recovery option

Given a user who deleted their account
When they log in within the 30-day recovery window
Then the account is restored with all data intact
